name: Zhejiang Risun Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Risun Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of automatic production, automatic storage, automatic sorting and logistics system. It offers intelligent suspension production systems, intelligent suspension warehouse sorting systems, plane logistics transportation systems, intelligent intersection pallet sorting machines, intelligent stereo storage systems, real time data acquisition systems, intelligent mobile robots, MES, WMS, and other automated production equipment and logistics equipment. The company serves clothing, home textile, home, auto parts, cases, bags, shoes, baby carrier, electric business, logistics, warehousing, washing, and other industries. Zhejiang Risun Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2005 and is based in Ningbo, China.
